2026-04-20T02:15:39.6820127Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T02:15:39.6820547Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T02:15:39.6820933Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T02:15:39.6821254Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T02:15:39.6821500Z [36;1m[0m
